operator_request: Proceed and activate WP-FF-004 after WP-FF-003 v2 was implemented, validated, and hardened.

basis.activation_basis: The project design and readiness matrix require a generated pinned yt-dlp compatibility profile and executable mandatory oracle corpus. Validated WP-FF-003 v2 supplies the fail-closed xtask, report, policy, negative-fixture, and bounded-process foundation that WP-FF-004 must reuse.
selected_approach: Generate a versioned compatibility profile from the exact pinned yt-dlp 2026.07.04 source and executable oracle.
Keep native Ferric semantics separate from yt-dlp compatibility-profile semantics.
Build deterministic offline oracle planes and mechanically separate opt-in live canaries.
Implement generation, validation, and reporting through the validated WP-FF-003 v2 fforager-xtask and report protocol.
rejected_options: A moving yt-dlp baseline, because regeneration would silently redefine expected behavior.
Live network responses as deterministic proof, because mutable external state cannot provide reproducible acceptance evidence.
Production Python or yt-dlp execution, because the authorized runtime is native Rust with supervised FFmpeg and ffprobe only.
A hand-curated inventory without completeness checks, because omissions would make compatibility claims non-enumerable and capable of false PASS.
research_required_before_product_impleme: Verify exact official source and executable artifact identities for yt-dlp 2026.07.04.
Inspect pinned upstream option, configuration, preset, extractor-registration, URL-matching, help, and runtime metadata implementation surfaces.
Compare proven inventory-generation, fixture-recording, normalization, sanitization, deterministic-replay, and corpus-sharding patterns from current primary sources and field implementations.
Record fixture redistribution boundaries, selected and rejected approaches, risks, mitigations, and the executable validation plan before generators or product contracts are implemented.
basis.validation_plan: Require deterministic regeneration, schema and stable-ID checks, independent completeness counts, missing/duplicate/change mutation probes, secret/path/clock/random/network negative probes, offline differential replay, distinct live-canary reporting, FF-GATE-ARCH-001, FF-GATE-PR-001, and independent adversarial closure review.

preserve: The complete compatibility, extractor, protocol, metadata, archive, collection, sink, and diagnostic scope in the current technical design.
The Rust-only production boundary and supervised FFmpeg/ffprobe exception.
WP-FF-003 v2 fail-closed architecture, tooling, reporting, negative-fixture, and recovery conventions.
change: Add the Phase 0A generated yt-dlp 2026.07.04 compatibility profile.
Add versioned deterministic oracle manifests, fixtures, validation, and differential reports.
Add no-context generation, offline replay, opt-in live-canary, sanitization, and recovery instructions.
assumptions_to_verify: The exact pinned yt-dlp 2026.07.04 source and executable artifacts remain obtainable and independently identifiable.
WP-FF-003 v2 paths and report schemas can be extended without introducing a parallel validation framework.
Mandatory deterministic fixtures can be sanitized and redistributed without retaining credentials or machine-local state.
non_goals: Ferric extractor, transport fingerprint, JavaScript execution, archive-store, or broad CLI implementation.
Production invocation of Python or yt-dlp.
A full replacement-parity claim from corpus construction alone.
Treating opt-in live canaries as deterministic closure evidence.

attack_lenses: Pinned-oracle provenance, version drift, and untrusted upstream input handling.
Inventory completeness, dynamic registration, alias collisions, interaction coverage, and false-PASS omissions.
Fixture secrecy, portability, nondeterminism, normalization drift, and unexpected network access.
Differential classification integrity, accepted-divergence authorization, report attribution, and shard merging.
minimum_controls: Fail closed on oracle identity mismatch, missing inventory rows, duplicate or unstable IDs, unknown normalization versions, and undeclared differences.
Cross-check inventory against at least two independent pinned upstream surfaces and prove omission detection with mutation fixtures.
Scan and normalize secrets, absolute paths, clocks, randomness, host identity, and mutable network inputs before fixture acceptance.
Mechanically separate default offline suites from explicit live canaries and emit distinct report classifications.
Require stable case IDs, deterministic shard merge receipts, and rejection of overlap, gaps, or corpus-version mismatch.
plausible_failures: A generator reports completeness while dynamically registered options, extractors, aliases, or interactions are absent.
A corpus passes a narrow happy path while errors, artifacts, archive behavior, redirects, or configuration interactions remain uncovered.
Cookies, tokens, absolute paths, timestamps, host identifiers, or other machine-local values enter committed fixtures.
A newer yt-dlp binary or a mutable live response silently replaces the pinned oracle.
A differential row disappears or is mislabeled so an unsupported Ferric behavior counts as PASS.
Parallel shards overlap, omit cases, or merge results from different corpus versions.

execution_decomposition: Verify current Git, packet, taskboard, validated WP-FF-003 v2, and pinned-oracle state.
Complete and record current broad source-level research before product implementation.
Freeze versioned schemas, stable IDs, normalization, sanitization, coverage dimensions, oracle identity, and deterministic/live partition rules.
Implement profile and corpus generators through fforager-xtask using the accepted WP-FF-003 v2 report and policy surfaces.
Create deterministic corpus partitions and explicit live-canary manifests.
Implement fail-closed inventory, corpus, sanitizer, coverage, shard, and differential validators.
Run mutation, negative, deterministic-regeneration, offline-replay, canonical-gate, and independent adversarial checks.
Update the model manual and close only through committed acceptance evidence and verified main containment.
